title: Liam Booth-Smith - Chief of Staff at the Prime Minister's Office, No.10 Downing Street - ACOBA Advice
body: "Lord Booth-Smith left his role at No.10 in May 2024.  External Affairs, Anthropic PBC Lord Booth-Smith sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Anthropic PBC. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
